name: calor-craft
description: Calorie tracking web app — food diary and product database
author: makaev.stepan@vk.com

scripts.dev: concurrently -n postgres,api,web "podman-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yaml --env-file .env.dev up" "wait-on tcp:localhost:5432 && npm run dev:api" "wait-on tcp:localhost:5432 && npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently -n postgres,api,web "podman-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yaml --env-file .env.prod up" "wait-on tcp:localhost:5433 && npm run start:api" "wait-on tcp:localhost:5433 && npm run start:web"
